allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002 }; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess } else { "No listener on 3000-3002" })
PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=36660 OR ProcessId=30260" | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='Cmd';e={$_.CommandLine}} | Format-List)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 36660,30260 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; "Stopped. Remaining listeners on 3000/3001:"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess)

PowerShell(try { $page = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "PAGE / -> $\($page.StatusCode\)"; $chunks = [regex]::Matches\($page.Content, '/_next/static/[^"]+\\.js'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Select-Object -Unique -First 4; foreach \($c in $chunks\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$c" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "  $\($r.StatusCode\)  $c" } catch { "  ERR $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)  $c" } } } catch { "Request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
